title: Record recompact 2.5%, speculative 3k, micro keep4/min32

fixtureActions.content:
# Recompact25 Spec3k Micro4 Contract

## Recompact 2.5
full compaction min recompact growth defaults to 2.5% so long sessions can reclaim again sooner after a compact

## Spec 3k
speculative pre-turn buffer defaults to 3k tokens for earlier preemptive compact without over-triggering

## Micro 4
micro compaction keeps the last 4 messages and clears tool results from 32 tokens so bulky tool output reclaims earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/micro/status vitest
